productDisplayName: Lotto Men Black Chamonix Sports Shoes
description: Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, the Chamonix II shoe from lotto comes with a synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces. Upper Mesh upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort and snug fit Cushioned footbed for shock absorption Midsole Phylon midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured geometrical lugs for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
